title: Add HAL retained crash and watchdog diagnostics records
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-h7t5.1.1 adds reset-cause/reboot boundaries, but retained crash records, watchdog breadcrumbs, and diagnostic dump storage require a separate retention/settings design and target-specific validation. What needs to be done: design and implement no-hardware HAL retained diagnostic records for crash reason, watchdog/reset breadcrumbs, validity/clear semantics, redaction policy, and native_sim/qemu tests; split physical retained-memory/register validation separately if hardware evidence is required.
close_reason: Future work - HAL retained diagnostics deferred to hardware validation phase
